proposal_summary: This proposal updates the preset permissions granted to Karpatkey to manage the ENS Endowment, adding 16 new DeFi actions and strategies across various protocols like AAVE, Compound, Balancer, Maker, and Curve.

disclosed_entities.name: ENS Endowment
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Endowment funds (endowment.ensdao.eth) must be executed by the DAO... 0x4F2083f5fBede34C2714aFfb3105539775f7FE64

disclosed_entities.name: Karpatkey
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Permissions granted to Karpatkey to manage the Endowment are not static

claimed_actions.raw_action: Add permissions for 16 new DeFi actions including depositing and staking on Compound, Aave, Maker, Balancer, Convex, Aura, Curve, SushiSwap, and Cow Swap.
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Enhance the Endowment's performance, adaptability, and diversification by granting Karpatkey additional management permissions.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Permissions that will be added in this proposal are: 1. Deposit USDC on Compound v3; 2. Deposit DAI on AAVE v3... The payload to update the preset that needs to be executed by the ENS DAO

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal requires updating the authorization payload with 16 new permissions corresponding to diverse DeFi strategies, requiring accurate configuration of permissions.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Permissions that will be added in this proposal are: [16 different DeFi interactions]

limitations: The exact function signatures for updating the permissions preset are not provided in the text, only high-level descriptions of the allowed actions.
